summary: Tested POS Security Features: 6/6 backend tests passed, frontend Feature 3 verified (expected cash hidden for cashiers, visible for admin). Fixed bug: movementSearch undefined error in CashRegister.js.
passed_tests: test_01_delete_terminal_not_in_use_succeeds - Terminals NOT in use can be deleted
test_02_delete_terminal_in_use_returns_400 - DELETE terminal in use returns 400 with 'en uso' message
test_03_close_shift_with_open_orders_returns_400 - Close shift with open orders returns 400 with 'cuentas abiertas' message
test_04_session_history_includes_total_difference - Session history includes total_difference for closed sessions
test_05_report_x_includes_cash_reconciliation_fields - X report includes cash_declared, expected_cash, difference
test_06_terminal_crud_operations - Terminal CRUD (create, read, update, delete) works correctly

feature_1.description: Prevent deletion of terminals currently in use
feature_1.backend_test: DELETE /api/pos-sessions/terminals/{id} returns 400 with 'No se puede eliminar. Terminal en uso por {user}'
feature_1.frontend_test: Toast error shown when delete attempted in StationTab

feature_2.description: Block cashiers from closing shift with open orders
feature_2.backend_test: PUT /api/pos-sessions/{id}/close returns 400 with 'No puedes cerrar turno. Tienes cuentas abiertas: Mesa X, Mesa Y...'
feature_2.frontend_test: openTablesError dialog shows dedicated error (not just toast)

feature_3.description: Hide 'Efectivo Esperado en Caja' from cashiers during cash count
feature_3.admin_view: 'Efectivo Esperado en Caja' box VISIBLE with RD$ amount (verified)
feature_3.cashier_view: 'Efectivo Esperado en Caja' box HIDDEN (verified via screenshot comparison)
feature_3.close_dialog: Arqueo de Caja dialog shows 'Total Efectivo Contado' but NOT expected total (blind count)

feature_3_report.description: X report includes cash_declared, expected_cash, difference in CUADRE DE CAJA
feature_3_report.verified: ReportXZ component at lines 431-458 renders cash reconciliation with declared vs expected comparison

session_history.description: Session history includes total_difference for closed sessions
session_history.verified: GET /api/pos-sessions/history enriches sessions with reconciliation data from MongoDB

bug_fixed.description: ReferenceError: movementSearch is not defined in CashRegister component
bug_fixed.fix: Added useState hook: const [movementSearch, setMovementSearch] = useState('');

seed_data_creation: No new seed data - tests use dynamically created terminals and orders
context_for_next_testing_agent: Security features tested and working. movementSearch bug fixed. Backend tests in /app/backend/tests/test_security_features.py can be used for regression. Admin has open orders on tables 9-14 that prevent closing shift - this is expected behavior testing Feature 2.
